title.en: Token Efficiency with Coding Agents: Mastering Auto Mode

description.en: This course dives into the concept of token efficiency using coding agents like GitHub Copilot and Cursor. You'll explore why token efficiency matters for cost-effective and faster coding, and learn how the 'Auto' mode feature in these tools automates code suggestions to optimize token usage. Through hands-on exercises, you'll set up these tools, practice coding with 'Auto' mode, and compare its efficiency to manual prompting. Additionally, you'll gain insights into best practices for managing token usage and understand why relying on the most powerful models isn’t always ideal. Designed for beginners, this short 15-minute course equips you with practical skills to leverage coding agents effectively, saving time and resources in your development workflow. Join us to transform how you code with smarter, more efficient strategies!
